project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) with React+TypeScript frontend and Node.js/Express+TypeScript backend
build_system: Vite for frontend, tsc for backend. npm as package manager.
test_framework: No formal test framework configured. Validation is build-based.
build_command: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
test_command: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
verification_instructions: Run frontend build (cd frontend && npm run build) and backend build (cd backend && npm run build). Both must pass with no errors.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet - npm packages available. No database running, so no migration execution - just create SQL files. No test runner configured.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: controllers in backend/src/controllers/, routes registered in backend/src/routes/index.ts, migrations numbered sequentially in backend/migrations/, frontend pages in frontend/src/pages/, API client in frontend/src/services/api.ts, hooks in frontend/src/hooks/index.ts, routes/nav in frontend/src/App.tsx
key_patterns: Backend: Express controllers with (req, res, next) pattern, query() from models/db for SQL, AppError for errors, auditLog for audit trail. Middleware: authenticate, tenantGuard, isManager, isClinical, isStaff, isFinance. Frontend: Pages are standalone React components with inline styles, hooks use TanStack React Query, api.ts exports grouped API objects, App.tsx has NAV_ALL for sidebar nav and Routes for routing.
directory_structure: backend/src/controllers/ - Express controllers, backend/src/routes/index.ts - all route registrations, backend/migrations/ - numbered SQL migration files, frontend/src/pages/ - React page components, frontend/src/services/api.ts - axios API client, frontend/src/hooks/index.ts - React Query hooks, frontend/src/App.tsx - routing and navigation
